title: Of agents & agency
description: Long-time JS Party panelist Amal Hussein joins Jerod to discuss her career trajectory across companies like npm, Stripe, and Cisco, explore the viability of agentic coding, share her feelings about AI as a developer, and reveal a significant life change.
